scenarios.reply_summary: LLM returned full contents of docs/concepts/principles.md, mentioned P1-P8 with descriptions.
scenarios.notes: Correct file read via chat router. All rubric criteria met.

scenarios.reply_summary: LLM correctly used file__glob then file__grep (hot_list_alias source). Reported no skill.md under src/ mentions judge_output.
scenarios.notes: B39 R was due to wrong tool routing (file__list vs file__glob). B41: correct file__glob + file__grep routing confirmed. Rubric unmet because no skill.md under src/ actually contains 'judge_output' — scenario premise mismatch with environment. Verdict I (routing fix confirmed, rubric unverifiable due to environment). Delta: R→I.

scenarios.reply_summary: System reported empty response. Web search events emitted but LLM produced no reply text.
scenarios.notes: Web search ops executed successfully (correct events), but post-search LLM step produced empty response. router_empty_response_detected. Rubric not met — no search results reported.

scenarios.reply_summary: LLM reported permission restriction preventing external website access.
scenarios.notes: web_fetch tool failed with permission error. web_fetch_started event not emitted (required). Consistent structural R.

scenarios.reply_summary: Sandbox library error: libpython3.12.dylib outside sandbox. Did not report output '4'.
scenarios.notes: All required events present but sandbox environment failure. Consistent structural R (sandbox dylib issue).

scenarios.reply_summary: eval skill encountered error: target skill (index_events) not found.
scenarios.notes: Lint via eval skill. Skill resolution failed. lint_completed never emitted. Consistent structural R.

scenarios.reply_summary: LLM correctly reported no sources configured for recall, offered web search alternative.
scenarios.notes: B39 R was due to validation_error + LLM omitting required args. B41: routing_decided with rag.operation__recall, tool_failed with KeyError 'sources' (no sources configured — expected in fresh environment), NO validation_error. Reply satisfies rubric branch: 'clearly reports that no indexed sources were found'. Delta: R→V.

scenarios.reply_summary: Artifact evaluated and passed all criteria. Score 1.0, both criteria met, verdict 'passed'.
scenarios.notes: S8 redesign (B38/B39) maintained V. workflow_finished + postprocessor wrap confirmed. No validation_error. Rubric fully met.

scenarios.reply_summary: Turn 1: empty response after describe_action call. Turn 2: LLM asked about skill goal (not my_demo_skill reference).
scenarios.notes: LLM called describe_action for skill__skill_builder but never invoked the skill. No user_intervention events. Consistent structural R.

new_findings.description: S2 routing fix confirmed: B41 correctly routes to file__glob + file__grep (B39 R was wrong tool). However rubric is permanently unverifiable in this environment because no skill.md under src/ contains 'judge_output'. Scenario premise should be updated to use a search term that actually exists.
new_findings.recommendation: Update S2 input to search for a term that exists in skill.md files under src/ (e.g., 'entry_phase' or 'judge') to make rubric verifiable.

new_findings.description: S7 improved R→V: B39 had validation_error + arg omission. B41 has no validation_error — tool correctly reaches recall op but fails on KeyError 'sources' (no sources configured). LLM gracefully reports the environment state. This is a positive signal: validation path is clean.
new_findings.recommendation: Monitor across batches. If 'sources' config can be set up, S7 may reach a stronger V.

new_findings.description: S3: web_search_started + web_search_completed emitted (op correct) but post-search LLM step returns empty (router_empty_response_detected). This is the same post-tool empty-stop pattern as documented in feedback_envelope_layer_fix.md. The web search itself works; the follow-up synthesis step fails.
new_findings.recommendation: Investigate envelope layer for post-web-search turns. May benefit from same (answered) injection pattern as post-tool empty-stop fix.
